verdict: 2026-07-01 17:50:23 PDT (-0700) — Sound design. The sketch is local, preserves the existing 401/503 contract, uses the existing AppContextError boundary to avoid logging arbitrary error messages, and follows the repo’s current console/[server]/stderr conventions. The dependency manifest has no first-party logging or validation dependency that would make this more declarative; adding one for a single diagnostic line would add surface without a concrete payoff. The proposed tests also align with the existing real-socket console-capture style and cover the important invariants: reason present, sensitive header absent, client response unchanged, and 503 path silent.
